title: Quality Management System
description: Establish QMS per ISO 9001 with documented quality policy and objectives.

title: Process Approach to Manufacturing
description: Manage manufacturing activities as interrelated processes per ISO 9001 Clause 4.4.

title: Risk-Based Thinking
description: Apply risk-based thinking to plan and manage QMS processes.

title: Internal QMS Audit
description: Conduct internal audits of QMS at planned intervals per ISO 9001 Clause 9.2.

title: Management Review
description: Conduct top management review of QMS at planned intervals.

title: Nonconformity and Corrective Action
description: Address nonconformities with documented corrective actions and effectiveness review.

title: Documented Information Control
description: Control documented information for distribution, access, retrieval, and use.

title: Environmental Management System
description: Establish EMS per ISO 14001 with environmental policy and objectives.

title: Environmental Aspects Identification
description: Identify environmental aspects of manufacturing activities and significant impacts.

title: Compliance Obligations Tracking
description: Track applicable environmental compliance obligations.

title: Occupational H&S Management System
description: Establish OHSMS per ISO 45001 with worker participation.

title: Hazard Identification Process
description: Establish ongoing hazard identification and risk assessment for manufacturing operations.

title: Incident Investigation
description: Investigate incidents to identify causes and improve OHSMS.

title: OSHA General Industry Standards
description: Comply with OSHA 29 CFR 1910 general industry standards for manufacturing.

title: Machine Guarding
description: Provide machine guarding for moving parts per OSHA Subpart O.

title: Lockout/Tagout
description: Implement LOTO for hazardous energy control during maintenance.

title: Process Safety Management
description: Apply OSHA PSM for facilities with highly hazardous chemicals above threshold.

title: Hazard Communication Standard
description: Maintain hazard communication program with SDS, labels, and training.

title: Respiratory Protection Program
description: Implement respiratory protection program for required respirator use.

title: Hearing Conservation Program
description: Implement hearing conservation when noise exceeds 85 dBA TWA.

title: OSHA 300 Log
description: Maintain OSHA 300 Log of work-related injuries and illnesses.

title: Worker Safety Training
description: Provide OSHA-required training including HazCom and PPE.

title: Severe Injury Reporting
description: Report fatalities within 8 hours and severe injuries within 24 hours to OSHA.

title: ITAR Compliance
description: Apply International Traffic in Arms Regulations to defense article and service exports.

title: DDTC Registration
description: Register with DDTC before manufacturing or exporting defense articles.

title: EAR Dual-Use Compliance
description: Apply Export Administration Regulations to dual-use technology exports.

title: ECCN Classification
description: Classify products with Export Control Classification Numbers per CCL.

title: OFAC Customer Screening
description: Screen customers and end-users against OFAC SDN list before export.

title: REACH Substance Registration
description: Register substances per REACH Regulation for EU chemical use over 1 ton.

title: SVHC Communication
description: Communicate substances of very high concern in articles per REACH Article 33.

title: REACH Authorization
description: Obtain authorization before placing Annex XIV substances on EU market.

title: RoHS Hazardous Substances
description: Restrict hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment per RoHS.

title: RoHS Phthalate Restrictions
description: Comply with RoHS 3 (Directive 2015/863) phthalate restrictions.

title: WEEE Producer Registration
description: Register as producer and report electrical equipment per WEEE Directive.

title: WEEE Take-Back Obligation
description: Provide take-back of WEEE for recycling at end of life.

title: EU Battery Regulation
description: Comply with EU Batteries Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 for EV and industrial batteries.

title: EU Packaging Directive
description: Comply with EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Directive marking and recycled content.

title: Extended Producer Responsibility
description: Apply EPR schemes for product takeback and recycling per state and EU law.

title: TSCA Section 8(a) Reporting
description: Report chemical manufacturing per EPA TSCA Section 8(a) when required.

title: TSCA Section 5 PMN
description: Submit Premanufacture Notice for new chemicals per TSCA Section 5.

title: RCRA Hazardous Waste Management
description: Manage hazardous waste from cradle to grave per RCRA Subtitle C.

title: Clean Air Act Permits
description: Obtain Title V and NSR permits for air emissions per state SIP.

title: Clean Water Act NPDES
description: Obtain NPDES permits for industrial wastewater discharges.

title: EPCRA Reporting
description: Report extremely hazardous substances per EPCRA Sections 311, 312, 313.

title: Toxic Release Inventory Reporting
description: Submit annual TRI Form R for toxic chemical releases above thresholds.

title: FDA Medical Device QSR
description: Comply with FDA Quality System Regulation for medical device manufacturing.

title: FDA Establishment Registration
description: Register medical device facility annually with FDA per 21 CFR 807.

title: FDA FSMA HARPC
description: Implement Hazard Analysis and Risk-Based Preventive Controls for food facilities.

title: Pharmaceutical cGMP
description: Apply Current Good Manufacturing Practice for drug manufacturing.

title: ISO 13485 QMS for Medical Devices
description: Establish QMS per ISO 13485 for medical device manufacturing.

title: AS9100 Aerospace QMS
description: Apply AS9100 QMS for aerospace and defense manufacturing.

title: IATF 16949 Automotive QMS
description: Apply IATF 16949 QMS for automotive supply chain manufacturing.

title: FSMA Foreign Supplier Verification
description: Verify foreign suppliers per FDA FSVP for imported food.

title: DFARS Cybersecurity
description: Apply DFARS 252.204-7012 cybersecurity for DoD contractor CUI.

title: CMMC Level 2 for DoD
description: Maintain CMMC Level 2 certification for DoD contracts handling CUI.

title: NIST 800-171 CUI Protection
description: Apply 110 controls of NIST SP 800-171 to systems handling CUI.

title: FCC Part 15 RF Emissions
description: Comply with FCC Part 15 unintentional radiator emission limits.

title: CE Marking Requirements
description: Affix CE marking demonstrating compliance with applicable EU New Approach Directives.

title: EU Machinery Directive
description: Comply with Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC for machinery placed on EU market.

title: EMC Directive Compliance
description: Comply with EMC Directive 2014/30/EU for electromagnetic compatibility.

title: Low Voltage Directive
description: Comply with Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU for electrical equipment.

title: Lawful Basis for HR Data
description: Document lawful basis for processing manufacturing employee personal data.

title: DSAR Response Within One Month
description: Respond to data subject access requests within one month.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Cross-Border Transfer Safeguards
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for personal data transfers outside EEA.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC Common Criteria for security.

title: MES Continuous Monitoring
description: Continuously monitor MES and ERP system access with automated alerting.

title: Manufacturing ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for manufacturing systems including IP / production data.

title: Production IP Encryption
description: Apply encryption to production specifications and trade secret data.

title: Industrial Control Systems Security
description: Apply IEC 62443 cybersecurity to industrial automation and control systems.

title: NIST CSF Manufacturing Profile
description: Apply NIST CSF Manufacturing Profile for manufacturing-specific cybersecurity.

title: Conflict Minerals Disclosure
description: Submit Form SD for tin, tantalum, tungsten, gold from DRC region.

title: Modern Slavery Statement
description: Publish annual modern slavery statement for UK businesses with £36M+ turnover.

title: California Supply Chain Transparency
description: Disclose supply chain efforts to address slavery and trafficking per CA TISCA.

title: UFLPA Forced Labor Compliance
description: Verify imports do not include goods from Xinjiang per UFLPA.

title: FCPA Anti-Bribery
description: Avoid corrupt payments to foreign officials in international manufacturing operations.

title: UK Bribery Act Compliance
description: Maintain adequate procedures to prevent bribery per Section 7.

title: DOT Hazardous Materials Transport
description: Comply with DOT HMR for hazmat shipping classification, packaging, and labeling.

title: IATA Dangerous Goods
description: Comply with IATA DGR for air shipping of dangerous goods.

title: IMDG Code Sea Shipping
description: Comply with IMDG Code for sea shipping of dangerous goods.

title: E-Verify for Manufacturing
description: Use E-Verify where state law mandates or for federal contracts.

title: FLSA Wage and Hour
description: Comply with FLSA minimum wage, overtime, and recordkeeping for manufacturing workers.

title: Process Hazard Analysis
description: Conduct PHA every 5 years for processes covered by OSHA PSM.

title: Mechanical Integrity Program
description: Maintain mechanical integrity program for PSM-covered process equipment.

title: Energy Star for Industrial
description: Pursue Energy Star certification for manufacturing facilities meeting criteria.

title: ISO 50001 Energy Management
description: Establish EnMS per ISO 50001 for industrial energy management.

title: Anti-Counterfeit Component Tracking
description: Apply DFARS 252.246-7007/7008 to detect counterfeit electronic parts.

title: Defend Trade Secrets Act
description: Maintain reasonable measures to keep manufacturing trade secrets confidential.

title: Patent Marking
description: Mark patented products with patent numbers to provide constructive notice.

title: Hexavalent Chromium Standard
description: Limit hexavalent chromium exposure per OSHA standard.

title: Beryllium Exposure Standard
description: Limit beryllium exposure per OSHA general industry standard.

title: EU AI Act for Manufacturing AI
description: Classify safety-critical manufacturing AI per EU AI Act with conformity assessment.

title: EU CSRD Reporting
description: Report sustainability per EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive.

title: TCFD Climate Risk Disclosure
description: Disclose climate-related financial risks per TCFD framework.

title: PFAS TSCA Section 8(a)(7)
description: Report PFAS uses per TSCA Section 8(a)(7).

title: VOC Emission Limits
description: Comply with VOC emission limits in coating operations per state SIPs.

title: Incoming Material Inspection
description: Inspect incoming raw materials per QMS procedures and AQL sampling.

title: Calibration Program
description: Maintain calibration program for measuring and monitoring devices.

title: Manufacturing Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS for manufacturing operations continuity per ISO 22301.

title: Manufacturing Cyber Insurance
description: Maintain cyber insurance covering OT and IT environments.
